Web Frontend¶

Main JavaScript file used by the web application.

Todo Page¶

  1import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
  2import { TrashIcon } from "@heroicons/react/24/solid";
  3
  4/**
  5 * TodoPage component
  6 *
  7 * Main page for managing tasks and weekly habits.
  8 * Communicates with the FastAPI backend.
  9 *
 10 * Features:
 11 * - Add / delete / complete tasks
 12 * - Select date for tasks
 13 * - Track weekly habits
 14 * - Toggle habit completion per day
 15 *
 16 * Backend endpoints used:
 17 * - GET /tasks
 18 * - POST /tasks
 19 * - DELETE /tasks/{id}
 20 * - PUT /tasks/{id}
 21 * - GET /habits
 22 * - POST /habits
 23 * - DELETE /habits/{id}
 24 * - PUT /habits/{id}
 25 */
 26
 27function TodoPage() {
 28  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([]);
 29  const [newTask, setNewTask] = useState("");
 30  const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState(formatDateLocal(new Date()));
 31  const [habits, setHabits] = useState([]);
 32  const [newHabit, setNewHabit] = useState("");
 33  const [weeklyGoal, setWeeklyGoal] = useState(0);
 34
 35/**
 36 * Formats a Date object into YYYY-MM-DD string
 37 * used by the backend API.
 38 *
 39 * param {Date} date
 40 * returns {string}
 41 */
 42  function formatDateLocal(date) {
 43    const y = date.getFullYear();
 44    const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
 45    const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
 46    return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
 47  }
 48
 49/**
 50 * Calculates the Monday of the week for a given date.
 51 *
 52 * param {string} dateStr
 53 * returns {string}
 54 */
 55
 56  function getWeekStart(dateStr) {
 57    const date = new Date(dateStr);
 58    const day = date.getDay();
 59    const diff = date.getDate() - day + (day === 0 ? -6 : 1);
 60    const monday = new Date(date);
 61    monday.setDate(diff);
 62    return formatDateLocal(monday);
 63  }
 64
 65/**
 66 * Generates the 7 days of the current week.
 67 *
 68 * returns {Array}
 69 */
 70
 71  function getWeekDays() {
 72    const start = new Date(weekStart);
 73    return Array.from({ length: 7 }, (_, i) => {
 74      const d = new Date(start);
 75      d.setDate(start.getDate() + i);
 76      return {
 77        label: d.toLocaleDateString("en-GB", { weekday: "short" })[0],
 78        date: formatDateLocal(d),
 79      };
 80    });
 81  }
 82
 83
 84  
 85
 86  const weekStart = getWeekStart(selectedDate);
 87  const weekDays = getWeekDays();
 88 
 89  // ================= TASKS =================
 90  useEffect(() => {
 91    fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/tasks?date=${selectedDate}`)
 92      .then((res) => res.json())
 93      .then((data) => setTasks(data));
 94  }, [selectedDate]);
 95
 96/**
 97 * Sends a request to create a new task.
 98 */
 99  const addTask = () => {
100    fetch("http://127.0.0.1:8000/tasks", {
101      method: "POST",
102      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
103      body: JSON.stringify({ title: newTask, date: selectedDate }),
104    })
105      .then((res) => res.json())
106      .then((createdTask) => {
107        setTasks([...tasks, createdTask]);
108        setNewTask("");
109      });
110  };
111
112 /**
113 * Deletes a task from the backend and updates UI.
114 *
115 * param {number} taskId
116 */
117  const deleteTask = (taskId) => {
118    fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/tasks/${taskId}`, { method: "DELETE" }).then(
119      () => setTasks(tasks.filter((task) => task.id !== taskId))
120    );
121  };
122
123  const markDone = (taskId) => {
124    fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/tasks/${taskId}`, { method: "PUT" }).then(
125      () =>
126        setTasks(
127          tasks.map((task) =>
128            task.id === taskId ? { ...task, status: "done" } : task
129          )
130        )
131    );
132  };
133
134  // ================= HABITS =================
135  useEffect(() => {
136    fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/habits/?week_start=${weekStart}`)
137      .then((res) => res.json())
138      .then((data) => {
139        console.log("raw habits data:", data);
140        setHabits(data)});
141  }, [weekStart]);
142
143  const addHabit = () => {
144    fetch("http://127.0.0.1:8000/habits", {
145      method: "POST",
146      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
147      body: JSON.stringify({ title: newHabit, goal: weeklyGoal }),
148    })
149      .then((res) => res.json())
150      .then(() => {
151        setNewHabit("");
152        setWeeklyGoal(0);
153
154        const ws = getWeekStart(selectedDate);
155        fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/habits/?week_start=${ws}`)
156          .then((res) => res.json())
157          .then((data) => setHabits(data));
158      });
159  };
160
161  const deleteHabit = (habitId) => {
162    fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/habits/${habitId}`, { method: "DELETE" }).then(
163      () => setHabits(habits.filter((h) => h.id !== habitId))
164    );
165  };
166
167
168/**
169 * Toggles habit completion for a specific day.
170 *
171 * param {number} habitId
172 * param {string} dayStr
173 */
174  const toggleDay = (habitId, dayStr) => {
175    // optimistic UI
176    setHabits((prev) =>
177      prev.map((h) => {
178        if (h.id !== habitId) return h;
179        const newLogs = { ...(h.logs || {}) };
180        newLogs[dayStr] = !newLogs[dayStr];
181        return { ...h, logs: newLogs };
182      })
183    );
184
185    fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:8000/habits/${habitId}?day=${dayStr}`, {
186      method: "PUT",
187    });
188  };
189
190  // ================= UI =================
191  return (
192    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto mt-10 p-6 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md">
193      <h1 className="text-violet-500 text-2xl font-bold mb-4 text-center">
194        To-Do List
195      </h1>
196
197      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
198        <input
199          type="date"
200          value={selectedDate}
201          onChange={(e) => setSelectedDate(e.target.value)}
202          className="flex-1 border border-gray-300 rounded px-3 py-2"
203        />
204        <input
205          type="text"
206          value={newTask}
207          onChange={(e) => setNewTask(e.target.value)}
208          placeholder="Add new task"
209          className="flex-2 border border-gray-300 rounded px-3 py-2"
210        />
211        <button
212          onClick={addTask}
213          className="bg-violet-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded"
214        >
215          Add
216        </button>
217      </div>
218
219      <ul className="space-y-2">
220        {tasks.map((task) => (
221          <li
222            key={task.id}
223            className="flex justify-between items-center bg-violet-50 p-3 rounded"
224          >
225            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
226              <input
227                type="checkbox"
228                checked={task.status === "done"}
229                onChange={() => markDone(task.id)}
230                className="w-5 h-5 accent-violet-500"
231              />
232              <span
233                className={
234                  task.status === "done" ? "line-through text-gray-500" : ""
235                }
236              >
237                {task.title}
238              </span>
239            </div>
240            <TrashIcon
241              className="w-5 h-5 fill-violet-500 cursor-pointer"
242              onClick={() => deleteTask(task.id)}
243            />
244          </li>
245        ))}
246      </ul>
247
248      <h1 className="text-violet-500 text-2xl font-bold mt-6 mb-2">
249        Habits (Weekly)
250      </h1>
251
252      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
253        <input
254          type="text"
255          value={newHabit}
256          onChange={(e) => setNewHabit(e.target.value)}
257          placeholder="New habit"
258          className="flex-1 border border-gray-300 rounded px-3 py-2"
259        />
260        <input
261          type="number"
262          value={weeklyGoal}
263          onChange={(e) => setWeeklyGoal(Number(e.target.value))}
264          min={1}
265          max={7}
266          className="border border-gray-300 rounded px-3 py-2 w-20"
267        />
268        <button
269          onClick={addHabit}
270          className="bg-violet-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded"
271        >
272          Add
273        </button>
274      </div>
275
276      <table className="w-full text-center border-collapse">
277        <thead>
278          <tr>
279            <th className="border p-1">Habit</th>
280            {weekDays.map((d, i) => (
281              <th key={i} className="border p-1">
282                {d.label}
283              </th>
284            ))}
285            <th className="border p-1">Goal</th>
286            <th className="border p-1">Achieved</th>
287            <th className="border p-1">Delete</th>
288          </tr>
289        </thead>
290        <tbody>
291          {habits.map((habit) => {
292            console.log("habit logs keys:", Object.keys(habit.logs));
293            console.log("habit logs values:", Object.values(habit.logs));
294            const achieved = Object.values(habit.logs || {}).filter(Boolean)
295              .length;
296
297            return (
298              <tr key={habit.id}>
299                <td className="border p-1">{habit.title}</td>
300
301                {weekDays.map((d, i) => {
302                  const isDone = !!habit.logs?.[d.date];
303
304                  return (
305                    <td
306                      key={i}
307                      onClick={() => toggleDay(habit.id, d.date)}
308                      className={`border p-1 cursor-pointer ${
309                        isDone ? "bg-violet-500" : "bg-white"
310                      }`}
311                    ></td>
312                  );
313                })}
314
315                <td className="border p-1">{habit.weekly_goal}</td>
316                <td className="border p-1">{achieved}</td>
317                <td className="border p-1">
318                  <TrashIcon
319                    className="w-5 h-5 fill-purple-500 cursor-pointer mx-auto"
320                    onClick={() => deleteHabit(habit.id)}
321                  />
322                </td>
323              </tr>
324            );
325          })}
326        </tbody>
327      </table>
328    </div>
329  );
330}
331
332export default TodoPage;

Personal Planner
